turns.user_message: I think I'm just someone who gets overwhelmed easily. It feels like my mind is always a few steps ahead of me.
This constant feeling of being on edge is starting to wear me down. I can't relax even when everything is quiet.
My heart races over nothing and I feel like I'm losing control. It's exhausting to feel this way all the time.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a conclusion they've reached about themselves.
